theme: stock a workshop so any commissioned gear assembles quickly
title: Stocking the Coset Workshop
strategies: dedicated-part baseline: stock every target as its own table entry (m=T, 1 factor each) -- the checker's own reference construction
whole-group baby-step-giant-step: build a table sized ~sqrt(p-1) around the given primitive root and look up every target uniformly, ignoring that most targets share a small hidden coset

hidden-subgroup inference: derive the hidden subgroup's exact order algebraically from the largest prime factor of p-1, build a 2-part table (coset representative + one subgroup generator), classify every other target by an exact membership test, and give each genuine target a short 1-2 factor recipe while decoys get one dedicated part each
